svg.text: Mission Planner · QGroundControl · PX4 ArduPilot · XPlane
Contributor to the C SSH2 library
Autonomous navigation and control system powered by ROS2 · WIP

text.tspan: Systems Software Engineer focused on high-performance C/C++ systems, Linux-based infrastructure, and networking programming.
Currently working on cybersecurity with secure communication systems and PAM solutions.
Background spans distributed systems, embedded software, and real-time applications.
Passionate about programming, linux and performance optimization.
